assumption_text: population changes are driven mainly by simplified predator-prey interaction rates
failure_consequence: external ecological drivers may dominate modeled dynamics

assumption_text: contact structure adequately represents transmission opportunity
failure_consequence: transmission estimates may be biased under behavior change or heterogeneity

failure_consequence: outputs describe scenario consequences, not guaranteed predictions
